svg.text: Review GitHub activity (is it actively developed?)
Never invest more than you can afford to lose completely
Dollar-cost average (DCA) into positions over weeks/months
Set stop-losses at 15-25% below entry for speculative plays
No single altcoin should be more than 10% of portfolio
Rebalance quarterly or after 20%+ deviation from targets
Sell remaining or hold with trailing stop
Always keep tax obligations in mind
Lock tokens for network validation. 3-15% APY. Low risk.
Lend assets on Aave/Compound. 2-8% APY. Medium risk.
Provide liquidity for DEXs. 5-50%+ APY. Higher risk (IL).
Stack yields across protocols. 10-100%+ APY. High risk.
Track every trade with CoinTracker or Koinly
Short-term gains taxed as income (<1 year hold)
Long-term gains lower rate (1+ year hold)
Tax-loss harvesting: sell losers to offset gains
Set aside 25-35% of realized gains for taxes
Know your jurisdiction's tax rules and benefits
Hardware wallet for holdings over $1K (Ledger / Trezor)
Unique email for crypto exchanges only
Seed phrase stored offline in 2+ locations
Never share seed phrase or private keys
Use separate wallet for DeFi interactions
Extreme greed index, mainstream media hype, taxi driver test
Real estate, index funds, business investment, stablecoins
DCA back in during fear. Accumulate fundamentally strong assets.
